data.title: Mona Lisa
data.desc: The quest to capture the Mona Lisa’s essence began in the game's vibrant world, forcing me to grind for natural pigments, using a base of brown and gray for the wooden panel and somber sky. The famously complex skin tones were achieved by carefully mixing only tiny amounts of red and yellow until the subtle, almost neutral complexion finally emerged. Her iconic landscape background proved the most difficult challenge, requiring delicate layering of green and purple to suggest distance and an almost mystical atmosphere. After a week of in-game toil, the final touches of a warm orange glow on the horizon and a vibrant yellow highlight on her dress brought the portrait to life. With only these basic colors, the digital masterpiece was complete, a pixelated testament to patience and the power of simple hues.
